name: NatureGlow
description: NatureGlow is an organic skincare e-commerce site featuring category-based filtering, cart & checkout system, and a beautiful UI optimized for modern shopping experience.
features: Users can securely sign up and log in via Firebase Authentication using Google or email/password, with active/inactive status tracked in MongoDB.
Role-based access control provides distinct dashboards and permissions for admins and users.
Admins manage products dynamically through a dashboard that allows adding, updating, and deleting items, with real-time UI updates.
Orders include saved delivery addresses (stored locally and in the database), live payment and order status updates for seamless tracking.
Powerful search and filter functionality enables quick product discovery by name, category, or other criteria.
The entire platform is built using React, Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB, with TailwindCSS and DaisyUI ensuring a responsive, user-friendly interface.
challenges: Managing real-time synchronization between the cart's local state and MongoDB database while implementing role-based private routes was challenging. Initially, users experienced a brief UI flicker during login state persistence check on page reloads.
future_plans: Integrate a secure payment gateway like Stripe, add an advanced product review/rating system for consumers, and implement automated invoice generation upon successful checkout.

name: ScholarHub
description: ScholarHub is a full-stack study platform featuring subject-wise sessions, multi-role dashboards, and real-time booking with session approval management.
features: You can see all our study sessions on My home page and click on the Ongoing button to see the complete details, and see the all reviews made by our other students, and there as a student you can book the session of your choice. Where there is a free or paid system

My website has different types of dashboard like admin dashboard, tutor dashboard, student dashboard. The student dashboard contains all the sessions booked by the student and click on Details button to see their complete details, and as a student can make important comments about this session.

Finally, there is the Admin dashboard where the admin can see all the users and can change the role of the user if he wants. There is also View all study sessions to add tutors from where he can Approve and Reject and set the session fee, and there is also View all materials Page.
challenges: Handling complex multi-role dashboards (Admin, Tutor, and Student) with specific API route protections using JWT took critical troubleshooting. Managing safe data refetching via TanStack Query during the instant multi-step approval process of paid vs free sessions was another major hurdle.
future_plans: Implement a real-time chat feature between students and tutors using Socket.io, add group video call links for live sessions, and introduce an interactive push notification system for class updates.

name: Granny Restaurent
description: Granny Restaurent is a responsive food ordering site featuring dynamic food listing, search, cart system, and food management for both users and sellers.
features: On the Home page of our website, there are some top selling foods and there is a button called SEE ALL FOODS, if you want, you can see all our foods from our All Foods page by clicking on that button. And there is a search bar in the title of the All Foods page from where you can find any specific food.

And you can see the complete details of each food by clicking on the DETAILS button of the food, and by filling the form given there by clicking on the Purchases button, you can purchase the desired food, and you can view each food you purchased from the MY ORDERED FOOD ITEMS page in table form.

Finally, if you want, you can add your favorite food for sale by filling out the form on our ADD A FOOD ITEM page. And specifically, the foods that you have added can be seen on the MY ADDED FOOD ITEMS page and you can update your food by clicking on the update icon given there.
challenges: Implementing the complex multi-input food update form with default values while maintaining form state using React Hook Form was tricky. Additionally, optimizing database queries to accurately filter data for the 'Top Selling Foods' section based on real-time purchases required deep backend adjustments.
future_plans: Develop a live delivery tracking map API, implement a daily food coupon/discount logic dashboard for sellers, and switch to a more responsive, premium design layout.
